summary: Iteration 96: All Service Desk features tested and verified. Templates loading in Settings modal, CSV Export button present, Custom Status/Category addition working, Dining Concierge Picker with 6 service tiles, Smart Auto-Assignment and SLA Alerts endpoints functional, WhatsApp status endpoint returns setup instructions (MOCKED).

templates_api.details: GET /api/tickets/templates returns 5 templates (Welcome Acknowledgment, Resolution Confirmation, Escalation Notice, On Hold, SMS Quick Acknowledgment)

templates_ui.details: Settings modal Templates tab displays all 5 templates with type badges (Email/SMS) and trigger info (Auto: new_ticket, status_change)

csv_export_button.details: Export button visible in Service Desk header toolbar

custom_status_addition.details: POST /api/tickets/statuses with {id, label, color} creates custom status successfully

custom_category_addition.details: POST /api/tickets/categories with {id, name, icon} creates custom category successfully

dining_concierge_picker.details: DiningConciergePicker component renders on /dine page with all 6 service tiles: Chef's Table, Private Home Dining, Pet Party Catering, Restaurant Reservations, Meal Subscriptions, Group Dining Events

dining_ticket_creation.details: POST /api/tickets/ with category=dine creates ticket successfully

sla_alerts_settings.details: GET /api/tickets/settings/sla-alerts returns {enabled: true, warning_threshold_minutes: 60, breach_escalation: true, notification_channels: ['email', 'browser']}

sla_at_risk_tickets.details: GET /api/tickets/sla-at-risk returns at-risk tickets with minutes_remaining and is_breached fields

whatsapp_status.details: GET /api/whatsapp/status returns {configured: false, setup_required: true, setup_instructions: {...}} - MOCKED, no actual WhatsApp provider

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed statuses and categories for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 96 verified all Service Desk features: 1) Templates load correctly in Settings modal with 5 pre-configured templates, 2) CSV Export button present in toolbar, 3) Custom Status/Category addition via POST endpoints working, 4) Dining Concierge Picker on /dine page shows 6 service tiles and creates tickets, 5) Smart Auto-Assignment settings endpoint returns expertise_map by pillar, 6) SLA Alerts settings and at-risk tickets endpoints working, 7) WhatsApp status endpoint returns setup instructions (MOCKED - no actual provider configured).

service_desk_templates.details: 5 templates: Welcome Acknowledgment (auto: new_ticket), Resolution Confirmation (auto: status_change), Escalation Notice, On Hold, SMS Quick Acknowledgment

csv_export.details: Export button visible in Service Desk header

custom_statuses.details: POST /api/tickets/statuses creates custom status, visible in Settings modal

custom_categories.details: POST /api/tickets/categories creates custom category, visible in Settings modal

dining_concierge_picker.details: 6 service tiles on /dine page: chefs_table, private_dining, catering, restaurant_booking, meal_subscription, group_dining

smart_auto_assignment.details: GET/POST /api/tickets/settings/auto-assignment for pillar-based agent expertise mapping

sla_alerts.details: GET/POST /api/tickets/settings/sla-alerts and GET /api/tickets/sla-at-risk for breach monitoring

whatsapp_integration.details: GET /api/whatsapp/status returns setup instructions - no actual WhatsApp provider configured

mocked_apis.whatsapp: WhatsApp integration is plumbing only - returns setup instructions when not configured. Add WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID and WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN to .env to enable.
